name: testAddAlreadyAddedFraudControlToBusinessUnit
description: Add already added Fraud Control to Business Unit: BU Control ActiveAdd already added Fraud Control to Business Unit: BU Control Inactive
descriptionHtml: Add already added Fraud Control to Business Unit: BU Control ActiveAdd already added Fraud Control to Business Unit: BU Control Inactive

steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0909.062459.28.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Add already added Fraud Control to Business Unit: BU Control ActiveAdd already added Fraud Control to Business Unit: BU Control Inactive

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
Select '0909.062459 company to bend Fraud Control' company using filter
Select 'Business unit repeat 0909.062459' business unit using filter
Verify that Warning message is presented
Verify that Warning message is presented again
